final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style editorial photo banner for a Weibo news/hot-topic post.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary photography, smartphone-captured aesthetic with professional polish, sharp details with natural texture
Composition: wide horizontal banner at 16:9 ratio, expansive cityscape view with generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: urban skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting golden sunset light
Scene/backdrop: cityscape transitioning into evening, neon signs beginning to illuminate, busy street below with blurred figures
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro with strong contrast, warm golden-hour light on building facades, cool neon accents emerging, moody and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and gold from sunset reflections as anchor, cool blue and magenta from neon lights as accent, deep shadows for drama
Materials/textures: glass and steel building surfaces with reflective sheen, asphalt street texture, motion blur on moving figures
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio strictly enforced; ample horizontal negative space in upper and lower thirds for text overlay; must appear as authentic on-site news photography
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial HDR look, watermark logos, 8K stuffer aesthetic, stock photo generic style, deformed architecture, plastic skin textures
